name: fulfillment_config
description: Maps product ids to the ordered list of fulfillment actions that run after a successful payment.

guide_delivery.description: Deliver an audience-specific guide file via email link or direct download.

kit_delivery.description: Deliver the kit package: guide + worksheets + scripts bundle.
kit_delivery.note: Kit zip files must be pre-built from guide + worksheets before launch.

sms_enrollment.description: Enroll the lead in the check-in SMS automation.
sms_enrollment.note: Never enroll without confirmed opt-in. TCPA compliance required.

email_sequence_trigger.description: Add lead to the post-purchase email nurture sequence.

bundle.note: sms_enrollment only fires if lead opted in.

free_crisis_resources.description: Crisis support resources — no payment, no delivery action.
free_crisis_resources.note: free_crisis_resources never enters the Stripe checkout flow.

email.note: Replace with SendGrid or ConvertKit. Use transactional email for delivery, not broadcast.

email_platform.note: Replace with ConvertKit or ActiveCampaign for sequence triggers.

sms_platform.note: Replace with Twilio or similar. Implement TCPA opt-in verification before enrollment.
